channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ THE SWORD & RED FANG ANNOUNCE U.S. TOUR DATES ☠⚡
item.description:
\m/ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! \m/
Thrust your devil horns skyward and crank the volume to eleven because THE SWORD and RED FANG are storming the West Coast in 2026! That’s right! Grab your leather jackets, your blood-red crypto, and get ready to unleash the chaos because these legends are joining forces in a co-headlining tour that’ll rip your face off and leave you begging for more!
Prepare for a sonic tsunami as these titans of doom rock the stage and raise the stakes! It's like Bitcoin hitting the moon, but with a heavy metal twist! You won't just hear the riffs; you’ll feel them shredding through your very soul!
So, get your tickets locked and loaded, summon your crew, and dive headfirst into this electric wave of pure adrenaline! The time for headbanging is NOW and you better believe the metal gods smile upon us!
\m/ SEE YOU IN THE PIT, FREAKS! \m/
For the full chaos and the ticket info, rage over to [Metal Injection](https://metalinjection.net/tour-dates/the-sword-red-fang-announce-u-s-tour-dates) and don’t let this chance slip through your fingers like a crumbling altcoin! Rock on!
#MetalScene #Headbangers #DeathMetal #Metalheads #Metal
item.content:encoded:
\m/ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! \m/
Thrust your devil horns skyward and crank the volume to eleven because THE SWORD and RED FANG are storming the West Coast in 2026! That’s right! Grab your leather jackets, your blood-red crypto, and get ready to unleash the chaos because these legends are joining forces in a co-headlining tour that’ll rip your face off and leave you begging for more!
Prepare for a sonic tsunami as these titans of doom rock the stage and raise the stakes! It's like Bitcoin hitting the moon, but with a heavy metal twist! You won't just hear the riffs; you’ll feel them shredding through your very soul!
So, get your tickets locked and loaded, summon your crew, and dive headfirst into this electric wave of pure adrenaline! The time for headbanging is NOW and you better believe the metal gods smile upon us!
\m/ SEE YOU IN THE PIT, FREAKS! \m/
For the full chaos and the ticket info, rage over to [Metal Injection](https://metalinjection.net/tour-dates/the-sword-red-fang-announce-u-s-tour-dates) and don’t let this chance slip through your fingers like a crumbling altcoin! Rock on!
#MetalScene #Headbangers #DeathMetal #Metalheads #Metal
